mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sos (member_id, sos_title, sos_type, sos_content, expires_at, is_complete) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{sosTitle}, #{sosType}, #{sosContent}, #{expiresAt}, #{isComplete})
mapper.select: SELECT s.sos_id, s.member_id, b.business_nm AS businessName, s.sos_title, s.sos_type, s.created_at, s.expires_at, b.business_addr, b.business_addr_detail, i.storage_key AS imageURL FROM sos s LEFT JOIN member m ON s.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN business b ON b.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN profile_image i ON i.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY s.created_at DESC;

SELECT s.sos_id AS sosId, b.business_nm AS businessName, m.badge AS badge, b.business_id, b.business_addr AS businessAddr, b.business_addr_detail AS businessAddrDetail, s.sos_title AS sosTitle, s.sos_type AS sosType, s.sos_content AS sosContent, s.expires_at AS expiresAt, si.storage_key AS imageKey, s.created_at FROM sos s JOIN member m ON s.member_id = m.member_id JOIN business b ON b.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN sos_image si ON si.sos_id = s.sos_id WHERE s.sos_id = #{sosId}
SELECT * FROM sos WHERE member_id = #{memberId} LIMIT 1
